26.reason: C99 style loop declaration may cause compilation error in C89

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  C99 style loop declaration may cause compilation error in C89
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [error: outer loop should iterate over m (number of terms of first polynomial), not n; this leads to out-of-bounds access and incomplete multiplication]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Compilation error in C89/C90: declaring loop variable 'i' inside for-loop is not supported. Declare 'int i;' before the loop or use C99+ standard.

28.reason: C99 style loop declaration may cause compilation error in C89

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  C99 style loop declaration may cause compilation error in C89
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [error: inner loop should iterate over n (number of terms of second polynomial); using m may cause out-of-bounds when accessing b[j]]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Compilation error in C89/C90: declaring loop variable 'j' inside for-loop is not supported. Declare 'int j;' before the loop or use C99+ standard.

30.reason: [Incorrect indexing: should be a[j] not a[i]; also c array reused without clearing, causing overwrite]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  index i may exceed a's size (m) if n > m; also b[j] may exceed b's size (n) if m > n
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Logical error: 'a' stores the first polynomial with m terms, 'b' stores the second with n terms. Loop variable i iterates up to n, causing out-of-bounds access on array 'a'. Should be b[i].xi * a[j].xi.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Array indices are swapped. Loop variable 'i' iterates over the second polynomial 'b' (size n), and 'j' iterates over the first polynomial 'a' (size m). Accessing a[i] causes out-of-bounds or incorrect multiplication. Should be a[j].xi * b[i].xi.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrect indexing: should be a[j] not a[i]; also c array reused without clearing, causing overwrite]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect indexing: should be a[j] not a[i]; also c array reused without clearing, causing overwrites]

31.reason: [Same indexing error: should be a[j].zhi + b[i].zhi or consistent pairing]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Same index swap error as above. Should be a[j].zhi + b[i].zhi.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same indexing error: should be a[j].zhi + b[i].zhi or consistent pairing]

68.reason: no check for zero coefficient after addition; zero terms may remain in output

15.reason: getchar() does not skip whitespace and will likely read the newline character left in the buffer by the previous scanf immediately. This causes the loop condition to be false prematurely, failing to read the remaining terms of the polynomial.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [fragile input handling: getchar() may consume unintended characters, leading to incorrect count of terms]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  getchar() does not skip whitespace and will likely read the newline character left in the buffer by the previous scanf immediately. This causes the loop condition to be false prematurely, failing to read the remaining terms of the polynomial.
